description_long: This object is a brown, oval-shaped plastic bottle with a narrow neck and a rounded shoulder, resembling a typical lotion or syrup container. The front features a large, circular label with a red border and white text, prominently displaying the Hershey's brand and product information. The bottle's surface appears matte with a slightly rough texture, and the cap is integrated into the neck, likely a screw-on type. The back of the bottle also has a label, though it is less detailed and more blurred compared to the front. The overall form is ergonomic, designed to be easily gripped and squeezed for dispensing the contents. The bottle is compact and portable, suitable for personal use in urban environments.
description: A brown, oval plastic bottle with a red-bordered label and a narrow neck, featuring Hershey's branding. The surface is matte and slightly rough, with a screw-on cap and ergonomic shape.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main label with Hershey's branding and product details, red border is prominent.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the bottle's narrow profile and the transition from the body to the neck, label edge visible.
description_view_2: Back view with a less detailed, blurred label and the same oval bottle shape.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the bottle's slim profile and the seam of the plastic.
